html:
Exclusive to:

The Curly Tails Mud Spa is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in Swinesbury Pig City and sells a variety of Healing items to the player.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, the Curly Tails Mud Spa also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, three Honey Poultices and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Shelfs
    • 2.2 Pillar
    • 2.3 Lamps
    • 2.4 Doors
  • 3 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering the Curly Tails Mud Spa, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Beautician Pig shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper.

Item Name
Anti Venom 5
Honey Poultice 5
Healing Salve 4
Blue Cap 3
Green Cap 2
Coffee Beans 2

Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves which will not be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name Amount
Petals 1 4

Decor

  • Fancy Plantholder
  • Fancy Chaise
  • Wall Mirror

Shelfs

  • Marble Shelf

Pillar

  • Lit Marble ColumnCorner
  • Lit Marble Column Front

Lamps

  • Fancy Lamp
  • Floral Lantern
  • Floral Lantern

Doors

  • Exit

Gallery

  • The interior of the Curly Tails Mud Spa.
  • Unused Burnt
  • Unused Burnt Broken
  • Unused Side
  • Unused Side
  • Unused Burnt
  • Unused Burnt Broken

–Wheeler

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Spa Bùn Đuôi Quăn là một Cấu Trúc Cửa Hàng Lợn sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy ở Thành phố lợn Swinesbury và bán nhiều loại vật phẩm Chữa bệnh cho người chơi.

The '''Curly Tails Mud Spa''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in [[Pig City|Swinesbury Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[Health|Healing]] items to the player.

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], the Curly Tails Mud Spa also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using four [[Boards]], three [[Honey Poultice]]s and four [[Pig Skin]]s.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering the Curly Tails Mud Spa, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. A [[Beautician Pig]] shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper.
